pre_install.instructions: Provisions a Traefik Hub workspace via hub-admin API and creates the license secret in the target namespace.
pre_install.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -eo pipefail

DRY_RUN=false
HUB_ADMIN_API=https://admin-api.hub-preview.traefik.io
SECRET_NAME=traefik-hub-license

echo '==> Traefik Hub pre-install provisioning script'
echo "    Dry-run: ${DRY_RUN}"
echo ''

# --- Step 1: Gather cluster metadata ---
echo '==> Step 1: Gathering cluster metadata'
CLUSTER_ID=${ID}
CLUSTER_NAME=${NAME}
CLUSTER_REGION=${REGION}
CLUSTER_CRN=${CRN}
CLUSTER_RESOURCE_GROUP=${RESOURCE_GROUP_NAME}
CLUSTER_PROVIDER=${PROVIDER}
ACCOUNT_ID=$(echo "${CRN}" | sed 's|.*:a/\([^:]*\):.*|\1|')
echo "    cluster_id:       ${CLUSTER_ID}"
echo "    cluster_name:     ${CLUSTER_NAME}"
echo "    region:           ${CLUSTER_REGION}"
echo "    resource_group:   ${CLUSTER_RESOURCE_GROUP}"
echo "    provider:         ${CLUSTER_PROVIDER}"
echo "    account_id:       ${ACCOUNT_ID}"
echo "    namespace:        ${JOB_NAMESPACE}"
echo ''

# --- Step 2: Extract customer info from IAM token ---
echo '==> Step 2: Extracting customer info from IAM token'
IAM_TOKEN=$(ibmcloud iam oauth-tokens 2>/dev/null | grep 'IAM token:' | sed 's/.*Bearer //')
if [ -z "${IAM_TOKEN}" ]; then
  echo '    ERROR: Could not get IAM token'
  exit 1
fi
JWT_PAYLOAD=$(echo "${IAM_TOKEN}" | cut -d. -f2 | sed 's/-/+/g;s/_/\//g' | base64 -d 2>/dev/null || true)
CUSTOMER_EMAIL=$(echo "${JWT_PAYLOAD}" | grep -o '"email":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"email":"//;s/"$//')
if [ -z "${CUSTOMER_EMAIL}" ]; then
  CUSTOMER_EMAIL=$(echo "${JWT_PAYLOAD}" | grep -o '"authn":{[^}]*}' | grep -o '"email":"[^"]*"' | sed 's/"email":"//;s/"$//')
fi
CUSTOMER_NAME=$(echo "${JWT_PAYLOAD}" | grep -o '"authn":{[^}]*}' | grep -o '"name":"[^"]*"' | sed 's/"name":"//;s/"$//')
CUSTOMER_IAM_ID=$(echo "${JWT_PAYLOAD}" | grep -o '"authn":{[^}]*}' | grep -o '"iam_id":"[^"]*"' | sed 's/"iam_id":"//;s/"$//')
ACCOUNT_NAME=$(ibmcloud account show 2>/dev/null | grep 'Account Name:' | sed 's/.*Account Name:[[:space:]]*//')
ACCOUNT_TYPE=$(ibmcloud account show 2>/dev/null | grep 'Account Type:' | sed 's/.*Account Type:[[:space:]]*//')
echo "    customer_email:   ${CUSTOMER_EMAIL}"
echo "    customer_name:    ${CUSTOMER_NAME}"
echo "    customer_iam_id:  ${CUSTOMER_IAM_ID}"
echo "    account_name:     ${ACCOUNT_NAME}"
echo "    account_type:     ${ACCOUNT_TYPE}"
echo ''

# --- Step 3: Call hub-admin provisioning endpoint ---
echo '==> Step 3: Provisioning workspace via hub-admin API'
PROVISION_URL=${HUB_ADMIN_API}/marketplace/ibmcloud/provision
PROVISION_PAYLOAD=$(cat <<EOJSON
{
  "cluster_id": "${CLUSTER_ID}",
  "cluster_name": "${CLUSTER_NAME}",
  "cluster_crn": "${CLUSTER_CRN}",
  "region": "${CLUSTER_REGION}",
  "resource_group": "${CLUSTER_RESOURCE_GROUP}",
  "namespace": "${JOB_NAMESPACE}",
  "provider": "${CLUSTER_PROVIDER}",
  "account_id": "${ACCOUNT_ID}",
  "account_name": "${ACCOUNT_NAME}",
  "account_type": "${ACCOUNT_TYPE}",
  "customer_email": "${CUSTOMER_EMAIL}",
  "customer_name": "${CUSTOMER_NAME}",
  "customer_iam_id": "${CUSTOMER_IAM_ID}"
}
EOJSON
)
echo "    URL: POST ${PROVISION_URL}"
echo "    Payload:"
echo "${PROVISION_PAYLOAD}"
echo ''

if [ "${DRY_RUN}" = true ]; then
  echo '    [DRY-RUN] Skipping actual API call'
  echo '    [DRY-RUN] Simulated response: {"token": "hub_xxxxx"}'
  HUB_TOKEN='hub_dry_run_placeholder_token'
else
  RESPONSE=$(curl -sf -X POST "${PROVISION_URL}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "${PROVISION_PAYLOAD}")
  echo "    Response: ${RESPONSE}"
  HUB_TOKEN=$(echo "${RESPONSE}" | grep -o '"token"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | sed 's/"token"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"//;s/"$//')
  if [ -z "${HUB_TOKEN}" ]; then
    echo 'ERROR: Failed to extract token from provisioning response'
    exit 1
  fi
fi
echo ''

# --- Step 4: Create Kubernetes secret ---
echo '==> Step 4: Creating Kubernetes secret'
echo "    Secret: ${SECRET_NAME}"
echo "    Namespace: ${JOB_NAMESPACE}"
echo "    Key: token"
echo ''

if [ "${DRY_RUN}" = true ]; then
  echo '    [DRY-RUN] Would run:'
  echo "    kubectl create secret generic ${SECRET_NAME} --namespace=${JOB_NAMESPACE} --from-literal=token=<hub-token>"
else
  kubectl create secret generic "${SECRET_NAME}" --namespace="${JOB_NAMESPACE}" --from-literal=token="${HUB_TOKEN}" --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
  echo '    Secret created successfully'
fi
echo ''

# --- Step 5: Verify ---
echo '==> Step 5: Verification'
if [ "${DRY_RUN}" = true ]; then
  echo '    [DRY-RUN] Would run:'
  echo "    kubectl get secret ${SECRET_NAME} --namespace=${JOB_NAMESPACE}"
else
  kubectl get secret "${SECRET_NAME}" --namespace="${JOB_NAMESPACE}" -o jsonpath='{.metadata.name}' && echo ' exists'
fi
echo ''

echo '==> Pre-install provisioning complete'
pre_install.delete_script:
#!/bin/bash
set -eo pipefail

DRY_RUN=false
HUB_ADMIN_API=https://admin-api.hub-preview.traefik.io
SECRET_NAME=traefik-hub-license

echo '==> Traefik Hub delete (deprovision) script'
echo "    Dry-run: ${DRY_RUN}"
echo ''

# --- Step 1: Gather identifiers ---
echo '==> Step 1: Gathering identifiers'
CLUSTER_ID=${ID}
CLUSTER_NAME=${NAME}
CLUSTER_CRN=${CRN}
ACCOUNT_ID=$(echo "${CRN}" | sed 's|.*:a/\([^:]*\):.*|\1|')
ACCOUNT_NAME=$(ibmcloud account show 2>/dev/null | grep 'Account Name:' | sed 's/.*Account Name:[[:space:]]*//')
echo "    cluster_id:    ${CLUSTER_ID}"
echo "    cluster_name:  ${CLUSTER_NAME}"
echo "    cluster_crn:   ${CLUSTER_CRN}"
echo "    account_id:    ${ACCOUNT_ID}"
echo "    account_name:  ${ACCOUNT_NAME}"
echo "    namespace:     ${JOB_NAMESPACE}"
echo ''

# --- Step 2: Call hub-admin deprovision endpoint ---
echo '==> Step 2: Deprovisioning workspace via hub-admin API'
DEPROVISION_URL=${HUB_ADMIN_API}/marketplace/ibmcloud/deprovision
DEPROVISION_PAYLOAD=$(cat <<EOJSON
{
  "cluster_id": "${CLUSTER_ID}",
  "cluster_name": "${CLUSTER_NAME}",
  "cluster_crn": "${CLUSTER_CRN}",
  "account_id": "${ACCOUNT_ID}",
  "account_name": "${ACCOUNT_NAME}",
  "namespace": "${JOB_NAMESPACE}"
}
EOJSON
)
echo "    URL: POST ${DEPROVISION_URL}"
echo "    Payload:"
echo "${DEPROVISION_PAYLOAD}"
echo ''

if [ "${DRY_RUN}" = true ]; then
  echo '    [DRY-RUN] Skipping actual API call'
else
  curl -sf -X POST "${DEPROVISION_URL}" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "${DEPROVISION_PAYLOAD}" || echo '    WARNING: Deprovision call failed (non-fatal)'
fi
echo ''

# --- Step 3: Delete Kubernetes secret ---
echo '==> Step 3: Deleting Kubernetes secret'
if [ "${DRY_RUN}" = true ]; then
  echo '    [DRY-RUN] Would run:'
  echo "    kubectl delete secret ${SECRET_NAME} --namespace=${JOB_NAMESPACE} --ignore-not-found"
else
  kubectl delete secret "${SECRET_NAME}" --namespace="${JOB_NAMESPACE}" --ignore-not-found
  echo '    Secret deleted'
fi
echo ''

echo '==> Delete script complete'

configuration.description: Name of the Kubernetes secret containing the Traefik Hub license token
